title: HR & Admin Specialist - Semiconductor
description:
• Join a new organisation scaling up rapidly.
  • Be part of the pioneer team.

About Our Client

Our client is a newly founded semiconductor manufacturing player who is scaling up their operations regionally. The organisation is ambitious and is seeking like-minded individual to be part of the startup story.

Job Description

  • Support the full spectrum of HR functions, including recruitment, payroll, and employee relations.
  • Ensure compliance with employment laws and company policies.
  • Maintain and update employee records and HR databases accurately.
  • Assist with performance management processes, training, and development initiatives.
  • Oversee office management and general administrative tasks.
  • Manage office supplies, procurement, and vendor relationships.
  • Coordinate company events, meetings, and internal communications.

The Successful Applicant

  • Bachelor's Degree in Human Resources or related majors.
  • At least 5 years of hands-on HR and/or administrative experience.
  • Strong knowledge of employment regulations and HR best practices across Singapore and Malaysia.
  • Excellent organisational and multitasking skills.
  • Proficiency in HR systems and Microsoft Office Suite.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal abilities.

What's on Offer

  • Startup environment where you will define the culture.
  • Competitive remuneration with attractive employee benefits.
  • Permanent position with long-term career prospects.
  • Supportive and professional work environment.

Contact
